pma:database.name: farmMysql
pma:database.pma:table: CREATE TABLE `yenibursluluk` ( `ID` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `Cinsiyet` varchar(10) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL, `Ad` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL, `Soyad` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL, `TC` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL, `Dogum` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL, `UniversiteTur` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL, `Fakulte` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL, `Bolum` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL, `OgrenimTur` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL, `Sinif` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL, `CepTel` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL, `Eposta` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL, `IlgilenDil` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL, `Amac` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL, `Sube` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL, `RandevuTur` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL, `SinavTuru` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL, `Tarih` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, `Okul` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL, `VeliAd` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL, `VeliSoyad` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL, `VeliTel1` varchar(20) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL, `VeliTel2` varchar(20) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL, `VeliMeslek` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL, `VeliEmail` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL, `KatilimDurumu` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0', `KatilimTarihi` datetime DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`ID`) USING BTREE ) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=3679 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci;

table.name: yenibursluluk
table.column: AFYONKARAHİSAR KIZ ANADOLU İMAM HATİP LİSESİ

table.name: yenibursluluk
table.column: YUSUF ÖZER MESLEKİ VE TEKNİK ANADOLU LİSESİ

table.name: yenibursluluk
table.column: TİCARET BORSASI ÖMER HALİSDEMİR İLKÖĞRETİM OKULU

table.name: yenibursluluk
table.column: AFYON BELEDİYESİ HARİTA İMAR BÖLÜMÜ ÇALIŞANI

table.name: yenibursluluk
table.column: AFYON BELEDİYESİ HARİTA İMAR BÖLÜMÜ ÇALIŞANI

table.name: yenibursluluk
table.column: ŞEMSETTİN GÜNEŞ İNGİLİZCE PROJE İMAM HATİP ORTAOKU

table.name: yenibursluluk
table.column: ÇAY MUSTAFA KEMAL PAŞA ORTA OKULU 8C

table.name: yenibursluluk
table.column: İBRAHİM EVREN MESLEKİ VE TEKNİK ANADOLU LİSESİ

table.name: yenibursluluk
table.column: ŞEHİT KAMİL TUNA KURTULUŞ İLK OKULU
